name: complex::else_if::ref::direct
source: import { ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const ready = ref(false); const enabled = ref(false); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { if (!ready.value) { sink(); } else if (enabled.value) { payload.value; } });
